basic_details.job_title: IBPS PO Recruitment 2026 Last Date Extended - Apply Online for 6715 Probationary Officers/Management Trainees Posts
basic_details.short_information: The IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI Recruitment 2026 notification has been officially released by the Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) for the post of Probationary Officer/Management Trainee (PO/MT) in Participating Public Sector Banks. As per the official notification dated 01.07.2026, the recruitment falls under the Notification Released / Application Open stage, with online registration starting on 01.07.2026 and closing on 26.07.2026. This article covers a single post group - Probationary Officer/Management Trainee - recruited jointly across 11 participating public sector banks under one

important_dates.correction_date: For 2 days after closing of registration (exact dates to be notified on official IBPS website)

application_fee.details: Payment is accepted only through online mode (Debit Cards, Credit Cards, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Cards/Mobile Wallets/UPI). Bank transaction charges, if any, must be borne by the candidate.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 20 years Maximum Age: 30 years A candidate must have been born not earlier than 02.07.1996 and not later than 01.07.2006 (both dates inclusive). | The relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates is allowed on a cumulative basis with only one of the remaining categories. The maximum age limit is applicable to General Category and Economically Weaker Section (EWS) candidates.

qualification.details: A candidate must be either: | A Citizen of India, or A subject of Nepal, or A subject of Bhutan, or A Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1st January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or A person of Indian origin who has migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, Kenya, Uganda, the United Republic of Tanzania, Zambia, Malawi, Zaire, Ethiopia, or Vietnam with the intention of permanently settling in India (an eligibility certificate from the Government of India is required for these categories). | Candidates must possess a valid mark-sheet/degree certificate confirming graduation on the day of registration and must indicate the percentage of marks obtained in graduation while registering online.

salary_details.details: As per the official notification, the pay scale for Probationary Officer/Management Trainee is: | Basic Pay: ₹48480-2000/7-62480-2340/2-67160-2680/7-85920 | The official will also be eligible for allowances and perquisites as per the rules of the concerned Participating Bank in force from time to time. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Test Name No. of Questions Maximum Marks Medium Duration
General/Economy/Banking Awareness/Digital/Financial Awareness including RBI circulars 50 60 English & Hindi 35 minutes
Data Analysis & Interpretation 40 60 English & Hindi 45 minutes
Descriptive Paper (Essay and Comprehension) 2 25 English 30 minutes
The IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI selection process consists of the following stages:
Online Preliminary Examination (Objective Test) Online Main Examination (Objective and Descriptive) Personality Test (self-report
non-qualifying but mandatory for interview eligibility) Common Interview Provisional Allotment
There is a penalty of 1/4th (0.25) marks for each wrong answer in the objective tests. No penalty applies for unattempted questions.

Total marks for Interview: 100 Minimum qualifying marks in interview: 40% (35% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates) Weightage ratio of Online Main Exam to Interview: 80:20 Final merit is based on combined score of Main Exam and Interview.
how_to_apply: Visit the official IBPS website: www.ibps.in
Click on the "CRP PO/MT" link on the homepage.
Click on "CLICK HERE TO APPLY ONLINE FOR CRP-PROBATIONARY OFFICERS/MANAGEMENT TRAINEES (CRP-PO/MT-XVI)".
Click "CLICK HERE FOR NEW REGISTRATION" and fill in basic details to generate a provisional registration number and password.
Upload photograph, signature, left thumb impression, hand-written declaration, SSC/SSLC/10th standard certificate, and other required documents as per specifications.
Fill in the online application form carefully using the "SAVE AND NEXT" option.
Pay the application fee/intimation charges online.
Click "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" after verifying all details.
Take a printout of the final submitted application form and e-receipt for future reference.
important_instructions: No change/modification/correction is allowed after the expiry of the Edit Window. Not more than one application should be submitted; multiple applications will result in forfeiture of fees for extra registrations. Any request for change of examination centre, date, or venue will not be entertained. Candidates should possess/acquire a valid Aadhaar card for the CRP process. Multiple attendance/appearances in the online examination and/or interview will result in summary rejection/cancellation of candidature. Any resulting dispute is subject to the sole jurisdiction of the Courts situated at Mumbai. Candidates must retain the same photograph used at all stages of the selection process.

_labels.apply_online: Direct Link to Apply Online for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) Post Name: Probationary Officer/Management Trainee (PO/MT) Total Vacancies: 6715 (indicative, as per Annexure I; some banks reported "Not Reported") Apply Mode: Online Start Date: 01.07.2026 Last Date: 26.07.2026 Qualification: Graduation (Degree) in any discipline from a recognised university Age Limit: Minimum 20 years, Maximum 30 years (as on 01.07.2026)

content_sections.heading: Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to read the complete official notification before applying. The detailed notification and application link are available on the official IBPS website. Extended Notification PDF: Click Here Official Notification PDF: Detailed-Notification_CRP-PO-XVI_Final_V1_30_06_2026 (as provided by IBPS) Direct Link to Apply Online for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI Official Website: www.ibps.in Grievance Portal: cgrs.ibps.in

content_sections.heading: IBPS PO 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: All dates above are tentative as officially mentioned in the notification and are subject to change. Candidates should regularly check www.ibps.in for updates.

rows.tentative_date: For 2 days after closing of registration (exact dates to be notified on official IBPS website)

content_sections.heading: IBPS PO/MT 2026 Vacancy Details (Annexure I – Indicative)
content_sections.text: Category-wise (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/UR) and PwBD vacancy breakup for each bank is available in Annexure I of the official notification. These vacancy figures are indicative and subject to change based on actual requirements reported by the participating banks.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A candidate must be either: A Citizen of India, or A subject of Nepal, or A subject of Bhutan, or A Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1st January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or A person of Indian origin who has migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, Kenya, Uganda, the United Republic of Tanzania, Zambia, Malawi, Zaire, Ethiopia, or Vietnam with the intention of permanently settling in India (an eligibility certificate from the Government of India is required for these categories). Candidates must possess a valid mark-sheet/degree certificate confirming graduation on the day of registration and must indicate the percentage of marks obtained in graduation while registering online.

rows.qualification_required: A Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a University recognised by the Government of India, or an equivalent qualification recognised by the Central Government.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit (As on 01.07.2026)
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 20 years Maximum Age: 30 years A candidate must have been born not earlier than 02.07.1996 and not later than 01.07.2006 (both dates inclusive). The relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates is allowed on a cumulative basis with only one of the remaining categories. The maximum age limit is applicable to General Category and Economically Weaker Section (EWS) candidates.

rows.category: Ex-Servicemen/Commissioned Officers (ECOs/SSCOs) with at least 5 years military service

content_sections.heading: Salary/Pay Scale
content_sections.text: As per the official notification, the pay scale for Probationary Officer/Management Trainee is: Basic Pay: ₹48480-2000/7-62480-2340/2-67160-2680/7-85920 The official will also be eligible for allowances and perquisites as per the rules of the concerned Participating Bank in force from time to time. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Payment is accepted only through online mode (Debit Cards, Credit Cards, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Cards/Mobile Wallets/UPI). Bank transaction charges, if any, must be borne by the candidate.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI selection process consists of the following stages: Online Preliminary Examination (Objective Test) Online Main Examination (Objective and Descriptive) Personality Test (self-report, non-qualifying but mandatory for interview eligibility) Common Interview Provisional Allotment There is a penalty of 1/4th (0.25) marks for each wrong answer in the objective tests. No penalty applies for unattempted questions. Total marks for Interview: 100 Minimum qualifying marks in interview: 40% (35% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates) Weightage ratio of Online Main Exam to Interview: 80:20 Final merit is based on combined score of Main Exam and Interview.

rows.test_name: General/Economy/Banking Awareness/Digital/Financial Awareness including RBI circulars

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must produce the following documents (original + self-attested photocopies) at the time of interview/document verification, as applicable: Printout of the valid Interview Call Letter System-generated printout of the online application form Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate or SSLC/Std. X Certificate with DOB) Photo Identity Proof (as specified in the notification) Mark-sheets/certificates for Graduation or equivalent qualification Caste Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC candidates, in prescribed format) Income and Asset Certificate (for EWS candidates) Disability Certificate (for PwBD candidates, issued by District Medical Board) Scribe-related certificate/undertaking (if applicable) Ex-servicemen documents (Discharge book, pension order, rank proof), if applicable No Objection Certificate (for candidates already employed in Government/PSU roles) Experience certificates, if applicable

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official IBPS website: www.ibps.in Click on the "CRP PO/MT" link on the homepage. Click on "CLICK HERE TO APPLY ONLINE FOR CRP-PROBATIONARY OFFICERS/MANAGEMENT TRAINEES (CRP-PO/MT-XVI)". Click "CLICK HERE FOR NEW REGISTRATION" and fill in basic details to generate a provisional registration number and password. Upload photograph, signature, left thumb impression, hand-written declaration, SSC/SSLC/10th standard certificate, and other required documents as per specifications. Fill in the online application form carefully using the "SAVE AND NEXT" option. Pay the application fee/intimation charges online. Click "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" after verifying all details. Take a printout of the final submitted application form and e-receipt for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No change/modification/correction is allowed after the expiry of the Edit Window. Not more than one application should be submitted; multiple applications will result in forfeiture of fees for extra registrations. Any request for change of examination centre, date, or venue will not be entertained. Candidates should possess/acquire a valid Aadhaar card for the CRP process. Multiple attendance/appearances in the online examination and/or interview will result in summary rejection/cancellation of candidature. Any resulting dispute is subject to the sole jurisdiction of the Courts situated at Mumbai. Candidates must retain the same photograph used at all stages of the selection process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI closes on 26 July 2026, with registration having started on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IBPS PO/MT-XVI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 6715 indicative vacancies for Probationary Officer/Management Trainee posts across 11 participating banks, though vacancies for Indian Bank, UCO Bank, and Union Bank of India were not reported at the time of notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 20 and 30 years as on 01.07.2026, with age relaxation available for SC/ST (5 years), OBC-NCL (3 years), PwBD (10 years), and eligible Ex-servicemen (5 years).

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IBPS PO/MT-XVI?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognised university, with the result declared on or before 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹175/- for SC/ST/PwBD candidates and ₹850/- for all other categories, payable online only.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves four stages: Online Preliminary Examination, Online Main Examination, Personality Test, and Common Interview, followed by provisional allotment to a participating bank.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary of IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The basic pay scale is ₹48,480-2000/7-62,480-2340/2-67,160-2680/7-85,920, along with allowances and perquisites as per the participating bank's rules.

faq.question: Q8. When will the Preliminary Examination for IBPS PO/MT-XVI be held?
faq.answer: The Online Preliminary Examination is tentatively scheduled for August 2026, with the Main Examination expected in October 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there a penalty for wrong answers in IBPS PO/MT-XVI exams?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks are deducted for each wrong answer in the objective tests, while unattempted questions do not carry any penalty.

faq.question: Q10. Which banks are participating in IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The 11 participating banks are Bank of Baroda, Bank of India, Bank of Maharashtra, Canara Bank, Central Bank of India, Indian Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, Punjab National Bank, Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, and Union Bank of India.
